title: SEYMAC stock Case for iPad Mini 7 (A17 Pro)/ Mini 6 8.3 inch, Shockproof Auto Sleep/Wake Smart Cover with Pen Holder [Multi-angles Stand]& Card Slot for iPad Mini 7th/6th Generation 2024/2021, Black
features: Compatibility: Shockproof case for iPad Mini 7 (A17 Pro) 2024 / Mini 6th Generation 2021 8.3-inch, Model (A2993 / A2995 / A2996 / A2567 / A2568 / A2569). NOT fits any other models & Pencil NOT included

Full Body Protection & Dust-proof Design: This Case for iPad Mini 7th/6th Generation 8.3'' is designed with anti-shock material, with hard PC frame, magnetic PU leather cover and soft TPU outer shell. All-in-one protection design to keep your Mini 6/Mini 7 away from scratches, shocks, dusts and drop damages

Multi-angle Adjustable Magnetic Stand: The case can offer 6 angles of support, so that you can always find the most comfortable angle for viewing/typing/drawing. And it can also be adsorbed to fridge door or other metal surface to help free your hands, especially convenient for cooking in the kitchen

Auto Sleep/Wake & Card Slot: The magnetic leather cover provides auto sleep/wake function, convenient for daily use and helps extend your tablet's standby time. Card solt is available to help keep your cards or other accessories organized and on hand

Stylus Holder / Wireless Charging: Built-in pencil holder for easy pencil storage and accessible for note-taking/ drawing. Mini 7 only supports Pencil Pro wireless charging and magnetic adsorption while Mini 6 only supports (2nd gen) Pencil (Pencil NOT included)
description: Product Description Shockproof Smart Case for iPad Mini 7 (A17 Pro) 2024 / Mini 6 2021 8.3 inch COMPATIBILITY: ONLY for iPad Mini 7th Generation (A17 Pro) 2024 & Mini 6th Generation 2021 8.3-inch.
